user_prompts.text: Would you agree that once we have the foundation in place, standing up new workflows is mostly trivial?

final_user_prompt: Would you agree that once we have the foundation in place, standing up new workflows is mostly trivial?
final_assistant_text_tail:
tures aren't workflows at all."

Rough split of remaining effort, as I read it: maybe 40–50% is the four additional workflows (cheapest to most expensive: sweep, build, repair, migrate); the other 50–60% is the non-workflow features plus the Phase 2 items still pending — real agent network dispatch, session hooks, continuity.

If P2.9 (review) lands cleanly and a third workflow also lands cleanly, I'd revise upward toward "mostly repetition." Right now we're proving the claim, not relying on it.
